name: The Ultimate Soul Land / Douluo Dalu RPG
description:
The Ultimate Soul Land/Douluo Dalu RPG
Crafted with 100% lore accuracy by a donghua fan.
LOREBOOK UPDATED AND OPTIMIZED to Version 2.0 (09-03-2026)

Lorebook Features
Featuring [max]—maxed-out lorebooks that actually work

Characters:
Includes 100+ major characters with deep-dive profiles covering identity, appearance, personality, history, relationships, background, martial souls, soul ranks, spirit rings, soul bones, domains, combat systems, and canon growth.
Regions & Locations:
Comprehensive guides for the major lands of Douluo Continent, detailing geography, architecture, academies, forests, capitals, islands, imperial spheres, sacred zones, war fronts, local factions, and the characters or forces most tied to each place.
Organizations & Clans:
Detailed breakdowns of every major academy, sect, empire, clan, and hall—including Shrek Academy, Tang Sect, Spirit Hall, Clear Sky Clan, the Seven Great Sects, imperial institutions, allied lineages, and other major power blocs across the continent.
Master Terminology:
Reference for Douluo Continent. Includes:
Cultivation:
Martial Souls, Awakening, Innate Soul Power, Soul Power ranks, bottlenecks, Martial Soul True Body, Domains, Titled Douluo tiers, and divine inheritance.
Soul Rings & Soul Beasts:
Spirit ring colors, age classes, absorption rules, soul bone logic, soul beast hunting, sacrifices, human-form rebuilding, and beast hierarchy.
Tang Sect Arts & Combat Systems:
Mysterious Heaven Skill, Purple Demon Eye, Mysterious Jade Hand, Ghost Shadow Perplexing Track, hidden weapons, poison use, combat roles, team systems, and battlefield specialties.
Institutions & Trials:
Great Spirit Arena, academy hierarchy, the Continental Advanced Spirit Master Academy Elite Tournament, Seven Great Sects, Spirit Hall structure, Slaughter City, Sea God Trials, and godhood systems.
Economy & Items:
Immortal herbs, medicinal treasures, hidden weapons, forging, blacksmithing, auction houses, sect logistics, materials, equipment, and war-ready craft networks.
Timeline & Arcs:
A full chronological history of events and story arcs, primarily following Tang San’s journey from Holy Spirit Village to godhood.

Available Timelines for Reference:

1. Holy Spirit Village Arc:
Tang San’s early, village life, martial soul awakening, and the beginning of the soul master path.
2. Nuoding Academy Arc:
Room Seven, Xiao Wu, Master Yu Xiaogang, the first spirit ring, and the earliest academy years.
3. Shrek Academy Entrance Arc:
Monster-only admissions, brutal training, teacher tests, and the first formation of Shrek’s core group.
4. Suotuo Great Spirit Arena Arc:
Team battles, spirit fighter badges, rank pressure, and the rise of Shrek’s name in formal combat.<
creator: jakeblake
